description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Busy traffic on Sai Kung Man Yee Road leading to High Island Reservoir East Dam
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 通往萬宜水庫東壩的西貢萬宜路交通繁忙

2026-05-01T09:30:00.CONTENT_EN: The Transport Department announces that the traffic on Sai Kung Man Yee Road leading to High Island Reservoir East Dam is very busy at the moment. The operator of Green Minibus Route No. 9A has strengthened its service to cater for passenger demand. Members of the public are advised to plan ahead their journeys, reserve sufficient commuting time, and be patient while queuing.
2026-05-01T09:30:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署表示，通往萬宜水庫東壩的西貢萬宜路交通現時非常繁忙，專線小巴第9A號線的營辦商已加強服務應付乘客需求。請遊人妥善規劃行程，預留充裕交通時間，同時在輪候時保持忍讓。

2026-05-01T17:55:00.CONTENT_EN: All car parks at West Kowloon Cultural District are full. Members of the public are encouraged to take public transport to the West Kowloon Cultural District.
2026-05-01T17:55:00.CONTENT_CN: 西九文化區內所有停車場現已泊滿車輛，前往西九文化區一帶的市民請使用公共交通工具。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Cross-boundary Travel related Arrangements / Notes during the Labour Day Holiday
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 勞動節假期跨境陸路口岸出行的有關安排/注意事項

2026-05-02T12:00:00.CONTENT_EN:
Cross-boundary Travel related Arrangements / Notes during the Labour Day Holiday
The Transport Department (TD) anticipates that more travellers would return to Hong Kong via land-based Boundary Control Points (BCPs) later today and tomorrow (2 & 3 May 2026). The TD appeals to these inbound travellers to plan ahead their journeys and reserve sufficient commuting time. It is anticipated that the demand for public transport services will be higher during the period and the waiting time would increase. The TD has instructed public transport operators to strengthen their services to meet passenger demand. The TD's Emergency Transport Coordination Centre will continue to monitor the traffic and public transport services at all land-based BCPs, and shall disseminate the latest traffic news through the TD's website (www. td. gov. hk) and “HKeMobility”. 

The public may make use of “HKeMobility” to access the snapshots of traffic conditions at the inbound and outbound vehicle plazas of Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) Hong Kong Port, and they may also check the real time situations of the vehicle clearance plaza of HZMB Zhuhai Port through the WeChat official accounts “hzmbzhport” or “zhuhaifabu” (or visit https://traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/),inorder to plan their journeys ahead. 

In addition, according to Zhuhai authority’s notification, temporary traffic arrangement may be implemented in Zhuhai during return peak to facilitate vehicles traveling to the HZMB Zhuhai Port. For details, please refer to the following link: https://weixin.qq.com/sph/Af2UaMAQCS.
2026-05-02T12:00:00.CONTENT_CN:
勞動節假期跨境陸路口岸出行的有關安排/注意事項
運輸署預料今日稍後時間及明日(2026年5月2日及3日)將有較多跨境旅客使用陸路口岸回港，運輸署呼籲有關旅客預早妥善規劃行程，預留充裕交通時間。運輸署預計在返港高峰時間的公共運輸需求會較高，乘客候車時間亦會較長。運輸署已指示公共運輸服務營辦商加強服務應付乘客需求。運輸署的緊急交通事故協調中心會繼續監察各陸路口岸的公共運輸服務情況，並會透過運輸署網頁（www.td.gov.hk）及流動應用程式「香港出行易」，發放最新的交通消息。

市民亦可透過「香港出行易」查閱港珠澳大橋香港口岸出境及入境客車通關廣場的交通快拍，以及透過「港珠澳大橋珠海口岸」或「珠海發布」微信公眾號內的「大橋口岸實時通關」服務(或前往https://traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/)，查詢大橋珠海口岸的車輛實時通關情況，以便及早計劃行程。

此外，據珠海當局通報，珠海市於回程的繁忙時段或實施臨時交通安排，以便利車輛前往大橋珠海口岸，詳情請參閱以下連結:https://weixin.qq.com/sph/Af2UaMAQCS。

2026-05-03T14:20:00.CONTENT_CN:
黃色暴雨警告信號現已生效，天雨路滑，運輸署呼籲駕駛人士及乘客須：
i.提早計劃行程路線；
ii.預留充裕時間出門；
iii.小心駕駛及保持忍讓；及
iv.留意交通情況，特别在視線受阻的繁忙路口。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Busy traffic at the vehicle clearance plaza (Hong Kong bound) of the HZMB Zhuhai Port
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 港珠澳大橋珠海口岸(往香港方向)的車輛通關廣場現時非常繁忙

2026-05-03T15:10:00.CONTENT_EN:
Busy traffic at the vehicle clearance plaza (Hong Kong bound) of the HZMB Zhuhai Port
The vehicle clearance plaza (Hong Kong bound) of the HZMB Zhuhai Port is very busy now. Members of the public who plan to drive their private cars back to Hong Kong via HZMB are advised to plan ahead their journeys, reserve sufficient commuting time, and be patient while queuing. The public can check the real time situation of the vehicle clearance plaza of HZMB Zhuhai Port through the WeChat official accounts "hzmbzhport" or "zhuhaifabu" (or visit https://traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/)(Chinese only) before starting their journeys.
2026-05-03T15:10:00.CONTENT_CN:
港珠澳大橋珠海口岸(往香港方向)的車輛通關廣場現時非常繁忙
港珠澳大橋珠海口岸(往香港方向)的車輛通關廣場現時非常繁忙，計劃駕駛私家車經大橋返港的市民請妥善規劃行程，預留充裕交通時間，同時在輪候時保持忍讓。市民可於開始行程前透過「港珠澳大橋珠海口岸」或「珠海發布」微信公眾號內的「大橋口岸實時通關」服務(或前往https://traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/)，查詢大橋珠海口岸的車輛實時通關情況。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Temporary Service Adjustment of Park Island Ferry Services
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 珀麗灣客運渡輪服務臨時調整

2026-05-03T19:46:00.CONTENT_EN:
The following ferry services are temporarily adjusted on 4 May 2026:
Park Island Transport Company Limited
'Ma Wan - Central' Route:
- Ma Wan to Central: Sailings departing at 5:00 p. m. and 7:30 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S)
- Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p. m. and 8:00 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S)

'Ma Wan - Tsuen Wan' Route:
- Ma Wan to Tsuen Wan: Sailing at 8:10 a. m. is cancelled
- Tsuen Wan to Ma Wan: Sailing at 8:30 a. m. is cancelled.
2026-05-03T19:46:00.CONTENT_CN:
以下渡輪服務於2026年5⽉4⽇作出臨時調整：
珀麗灣客運有限公司
「⾺灣-中環」航線：
-⾺灣⾄中環：下午5時及下午7時30分開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運
-中環⾄⾺灣：下午5時30分及下午8時開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運

「⾺灣-荃灣」航線：
-⾺灣⾄荃灣：取消上午8時10分開出的班次
-荃灣⾄⾺灣：取消上午8時30分開出的班次。
